title: Fix division by zero in calculator
description: The test suite reports a failure in test_division_by_zero within tests/test_calc.py. When dividing by zero, the current divide function in src/calculator.py raises an unhandled ZeroDivisionError instead of returning a defined value (e.g., raising a custom CalculatorError or returning None as per the spec). The full pytest output is captured in test_output.log, and a short summary is in BUG_REPORT.md. Please investigate the root cause and propose a fix plan.

title: Update README with contribution guidelines
description: Add a section to README.md describing how to run tests, report bugs, and submit pull requests. This helps new contributors get started quickly.
